obj_room_castle_tv_mike_b_slash_Step_0_g: * Oh^1, TENNA!!^1! Whatever do you need^1, my pal!?/%
* Hey^1, Tenna^1. Youse's wearin' the wrong costume^1, too?/%
* That's not Tenna^1, you idiot!/%
* Why the heck did you knock like that!^1? You made us dress up!/%
* And YOU^1! Are you EVER gonna take that thing off?/%
* Hey^1! HEY^1! I'm talking to you^1! You^1, uhh^1, uhh..^1. what was your name again?/%
* Look^1, I'm not saying that^1! Can't we just call you.../%
* PLUEY^1? You want us to call you PLUEY!?/
* You're MIKE!!^1! PLUEY is the name of the MINIGAME!!!/
* Oh no./
* Hel-LO^1! Someone needs a little antenna massage...!/%
* IT'S TENNA!^1! EVERYONE GET YOUR COSTUMES ON!!/%
* NOT YOU!!!/
* Ohh^1, where are you...?/%
* Hey^1, uh..^1. where is he?/
* Where's PLUEY!^1? I wanna see my lil' PLUEY!!!/
* PLUEY'S THE NAME OF THE GAME!!!/
* HIS NAME'S NOT PLUEY!!^1! IT'S MIKE!!!/
* Hey^1, don't get lippy with me^1, dice boy!/
* I know Mike better than you^1, and sometimes he IS a cute lil' Pluey!/
* Now bring him out or I'm tightening your contract!/%
* Got it^1, boss./%
* Oh boy^1, oh boy^1, Mike^1! Now there's ONE GUY who NEVER lets me down!/%
* Hey^1, Tenna!/
* Oh^1, uh..^1. MIKE!/%
* You^1, uh^1, you don't look very Pluey today./
* Yes./
* I don't feel very Pluey today./%
* Well^1, a massage is a massage^1! I'll just close my eyes and imagine^1! Haha!/
* Now feel free to climb up there and let 'er rip!/%
* Hey^1, Mike^1? When^1, uh^1, when are you gonna start the^1, uh.../
* I'm not doing it./
* Huh?/
* I'm not doing anything for you anymore./%
* HA HA HA HA HA!!^1! HA HA HA HA HA!!!/%
* Haha^1, you always were a jokester^1, Mike.../
* Not when you treat the people who work with you like expendable trash./
* T..^1. trash?/
* Mike^1, y-you know I don't do that!!^1! I'm always.../
* I'm always^1, y'know^1, adding lots of little^1, uh^1, bonuses to their contracts!!/
* Y'know!^1! Paid fruit-flavored vacation^1, left over glooby slime^1, you know!!/%
* ..^1. I know^1. I know what this is about./
* You told me^1. You TOLD me you had a bad feeling about that contract./
* That he wasn't supposed to sign it^1. That he COULDN'T./
* ..^1. and if he did^1, something terrible would happen./
* And even though I knew that..^1. I still made him do it anyway./
* But how could it be MY fault!?/
* I needed to be BIG..^1. I needed it just as much as anyone else!/
* How is it MY fault HE ran out on ME!?/
* I could have helped him^1! I WOULD have^1! We could've been big TOGETHER!/%
* ..^1. you cared about him too^1, Mike./
* That's why..^1. since then..^1. it feels like..^1. you're not really here./
* Everything is..^1. fake./
* When the curtain falls..^1. everything just feels like.../
* Playing pretend./
* ..^1. you know what I mean^1, Mike?/%
* Can we^1, uh.../
* Can I^1, see the part of the employee contract.../
* That stipulates^1, fruit-flavored vacations?/
* Oh^1, uh^1, yeah^1! Yeah^1, right here^1! Haha^1! I'm adding it!/
* And the slime^1, haha^1! Can't forget the slime./%
* I can never..^1. forget the slime./
* You know^1, I think I need to go./
* Get more..^1. Pluey./
* Haha^1, yeah^1! Great idea^1, Mike^1, great!/%
* Kris?/
* I don't know if it's just me^1, but.../
* Keep an eye on that for me.../%
* What?/
* Tenna..^1. he's ACTUALLY not coming back!?/%
* Y'know^1, I guess I^1, I heard about that^1, but.../
* I..^1. haha^1, I sort of theorized..^1. it had to be a joke!/
* He's an important guy^1, right!?/
* Guys like him don't just..^1. disappear^1, right!?/%
* Yeah^1, boss^1. I ain't wanna believe it either./%
* What do you mean!^1? What could be better than HIM being gone!?/
* We can do WHATEVER we want now^1! ANYTHING!/%
* Ya wanna put the costumes back on^1, boss?/%
obj_room_castle_tv_mike_door_slash_Step_: * (You had a strange gut feeling^1. That whatever's inside the door today...)/
* (Probably wouldn't make sense unless you had been inside yesterday.)/
obj_room_dungeon_2f_slash_Step_0_gml_81_: \M1\E6* What^1? You dare insult my greatest mark of pride!?/
obj_room_dungeon_2f_slash_Step_0_gml_83_: \E2* Umm^1, no^1! We actually really like it!/
obj_room_dungeon_2f_slash_Step_0_gml_85_: \M4\E4* HA^1! Rich^1, coming from you^1, patsy!/
obj_room_dungeon_2f_slash_Step_0_gml_87_: \M0\E1* I remember it like it was yesterday./
obj_room_dungeon_2f_slash_Step_0_gml_88_: \M2\E2* A blissful time^1. An era of harmony^1, with the Lightners./
obj_room_dungeon_2f_slash_Step_0_gml_89_: \E8* A golden age^1, where we were held^1, cherished.../
obj_room_dungeon_2f_slash_Step_0_gml_90_: \M0\E1* But one day^1, the hand of a Lightner slipped.../
obj_room_dungeon_2f_slash_Step_0_gml_93_: \M0\E1* Torn with a scar that could be seen even from the back./
obj_room_dungeon_2f_slash_Step_0_gml_94_: \E2* A single scarred king..^1. that rendered the whole kingdom.../
obj_room_dungeon_2f_slash_Step_0_gml_96_: \E3* We were banished^1, relegated to eternal darkness./
obj_room_dungeon_2f_slash_Step_0_gml_98_: \M1\E0* Now^1, this mark is my pride^1! A mark of glory.../
obj_room_dungeon_2f_slash_Step_0_gml_99_: \M4\E4* Of the revenge I will one day take on you lot^1! GAHAHA!!/%
